description: Universal differential equation: nominal dynamics plus a learned state-derivative residual.
notes: Good for model-form error; residual dynamics are less directly interpretable as aerodynamic coefficients. Residual gain=1.

description: Supervised neural surrogate for hidden aerodynamic coefficient residuals.
notes: Uses synthetic residual labels, so treat as an upper-bound surrogate rather than a flight-data-only identifier.

description: Modified Non-Determinant PINN-style closure: EOM residual identifies learned nonlinear aerodynamic coefficients.
notes: Flight-dynamics-level PINN surrogate; does not enforce CFD/Navier-Stokes physics. Residual gain=1.

description: Sparse RBF/Gaussian-process-style surrogate for aerodynamic coefficient residuals.
notes: Finite-basis RBF approximation to a GP coefficient closure trained from EOM-inferred coefficient residuals; centers=384, length_scale=3.03, residual gain=1.

description: Extended Kalman filter parameter-identification baseline; parameters are learned from training measurements then frozen for open-loop validation.
notes: Training-only augmented-state EKF estimates the aerodynamic parameter vector using 8 trials at stride 10; validation is a pilot-command-only open-loop rollout.

description: Output-error fit with latent flight states and mocap position/attitude as the measured output.
notes: CasADi/IPOPT backend; preferred mocap formulation because it avoids differentiating position/attitude into noisy state targets.

description: PINN-style hidden-controller model: EOM pitch residual identifies a learned elevator command reshaping law.
notes: Uses the pitch-moment equation as the physics residual, so it targets SAFE/AS3X elevator behavior rather than aerodynamic residuals.

description: Universal-differential-equation style hidden-input model: nominal plant driven by pilot command plus learned input correction.
notes: Learns an effective throttle/elevator correction from EOM residuals; intended for hidden actuator/autopilot input mismatch.

description: Initial-condition clustered local linear state-space models blended by scheduling weights.
notes: Fits 6 local discrete deviation models from whole local-excitation trajectory groups; rollout blends local predictions with RBF weights in state-input space, length_scale=0.92. Validation uses only x0 and the supplied pilot-command history.

description: Derivative-based least squares on inferred lift, drag, and moment coefficients.
notes: Fast and interpretable, but differentiating noisy measurements biases the fit.

description: Sparse multiple-shooting MAP fit with latent states, mocap outputs, and process residuals.
notes: CasADi/IPOPT sparse latent-state estimator; approximates the variational/filter-error role without posterior covariance propagation.

description: Discrete local linear state-space baseline fitted by one-step least squares.
notes: Validation is an open-loop rollout from x0 using the supplied pilot-command history only; good scores indicate in-distribution discrete prediction, not aerodynamic interpretability.

description: Known nominal rigid-body and aerodynamic model, no fitted correction.
notes: Baseline; expected to miss hidden nonlinear aerodynamic terms.

description: Single-shooting output-error fit of the nominal aerodynamic parameter vector.

description: Trim-grid collection of local Welch continuous-time linear models blended by scheduling weights.

description: Coherence-weighted continuous-time linear model fitted from averaged Welch state/input spectra.

description: Forward stepwise symbolic regression over the shared nonlinear candidate library.

description: Initial-condition clustered local linear state-space models blended by scheduling weights.
notes: Fits 6 local discrete deviation models from whole local-excitation trajectory groups; rollout blends local predictions with RBF weights in state-input space, length_scale=0.937. Validation uses only x0 and the supplied pilot-command history.

description: Derivative-based least squares on inferred lift, drag, and moment coefficients.
notes: Fast and interpretable, but differentiating noisy measurements biases the fit.

description: One-shot structured sparse aerodynamic coefficient model.
notes: Fits protected low-order aircraft coefficient terms and sparse residual-library terms in one regression; protected terms are not thresholded, residual terms are selected by sequential thresholded least squares.

description: Lifted linear discrete-time predictor fitted by extended dynamic mode decomposition.
notes: Uses the same polynomial/trigonometric library as SINDy, but fits a one-step lifted map rather than sparse continuous-time derivatives; validation is open-loop from x0 and the supplied pilot-command history.

description: Forward stepwise symbolic regression over the shared nonlinear candidate library.
notes: Selects at most 5 nonconstant terms per state with a BIC-style complexity penalty.

description: Coherence-weighted continuous-time linear model fitted from averaged Welch state/input spectra.
notes: Welch/ETFE-inspired spectral fit using bins up to 12 Hz and coherence threshold 0.08; this is not CIFER and should be interpreted only as a compact local linear frequency-domain baseline.

description: Trim-grid collection of local Welch continuous-time linear models blended by scheduling weights.
notes: Fits 6 local Welch/ETFE-inspired continuous-time models on trim-grid groups; rollout blends local derivatives with RBF weights in state-input space, length_scale=0.937. This tests local frequency-domain stitching, not CIFER.

description: Universal differential equation: nominal dynamics plus a learned state-derivative residual.
notes: Good for model-form error; residual dynamics are less directly interpretable as aerodynamic coefficients. Residual gain=1.

description: Initial-condition clustered local linear state-space models blended by scheduling weights.
notes: Fits 6 local discrete deviation models from whole local-excitation trajectory groups; rollout blends local predictions with RBF weights in state-input space, length_scale=0.92. Validation uses only x0 and the supplied pilot-command history.

description: Discrete local linear state-space baseline fitted by one-step least squares.
notes: Validation is an open-loop rollout from x0 using the supplied pilot-command history only; good scores indicate in-distribution discrete prediction, not aerodynamic interpretability.

description: Known nominal rigid-body and aerodynamic model, no fitted correction.
notes: Baseline; expected to miss hidden nonlinear aerodynamic terms.

description: Single-shooting output-error fit of the nominal aerodynamic parameter vector.
notes: CasADi/IPOPT backend fitted on 2 trajectory samples with stride 10; nonlinear residuals are unmodeled.

description: PINN-style hidden-controller model: EOM pitch residual identifies a learned elevator command reshaping law.
notes: Uses the pitch-moment equation as the physics residual, so it targets SAFE/AS3X elevator behavior rather than aerodynamic residuals.

description: Universal-differential-equation style hidden-input model: nominal plant driven by pilot command plus learned input correction.
notes: Learns an effective throttle/elevator correction from EOM residuals; intended for hidden actuator/autopilot input mismatch.

description: Extended Kalman filter parameter-identification baseline; parameters are learned from training measurements then frozen for open-loop validation.
notes: Training-only augmented-state EKF estimates the aerodynamic parameter vector using 8 trials at stride 10; validation is a pilot-command-only open-loop rollout.

description: Lifted linear discrete-time predictor fitted by extended dynamic mode decomposition.
notes: Uses the same polynomial/trigonometric library as SINDy, but fits a one-step lifted map rather than sparse continuous-time derivatives; validation is open-loop from x0 and the supplied pilot-command history.

description: Trim-grid collection of local Welch continuous-time linear models blended by scheduling weights.

description: Modified Non-Determinant PINN-style closure: EOM residual identifies learned nonlinear aerodynamic coefficients.
notes: Flight-dynamics-level PINN surrogate; does not enforce CFD/Navier-Stokes physics. Residual gain=1.

description: Supervised neural surrogate for hidden aerodynamic coefficient residuals.
notes: Uses synthetic residual labels, so treat as an upper-bound surrogate rather than a flight-data-only identifier.

description: Coherence-weighted continuous-time linear model fitted from averaged Welch state/input spectra.

description: Output-error fit with latent flight states and mocap position/attitude as the measured output.
notes: CasADi/IPOPT backend; preferred mocap formulation because it avoids differentiating position/attitude into noisy state targets.

notes: No-fit baseline; mismatch includes actuator lag, hidden stall/nonlinear aerodynamics, and mocap-derived initialization error.

description: Global affine discrete state-space fit x[k+1]=A x[k]+B u_cmd[k]+c.
notes: Open-loop rollout; validation measurements are not assimilated after initialization.

description: Nominal RK4 model plus ridge-fitted one-step residual correction.
notes: Residual corrects actuator lag and hidden nonlinear stall/aerodynamic effects around the attached-flow model.

description: Airdata-scheduled family of local affine one-step state models.
notes: Local models are selected by speed, angle of attack, and sideslip during open-loop validation.

description: Frequency-domain-inspired global linear baseline approximated by a regularized one-step realization.
notes: Placeholder 6DOF frequency row: uses an identified realization rather than CIFER/SIDPAC tooling.

description: Airdata-scheduled local realization residuals around the nominal 6DOF equations.
notes: 6DOF counterpart to local frequency/model stitching; trained from the selected 6DOF dataset.

description: Recursive-estimation analogue represented by a fitted affine residual parameter vector.
notes: The validation phase is open loop and receives only pilot commands after initialization.

description: Fisher-information wrapper around the fitted residual parameter model.
notes: Point prediction matches the EKF-style parameter estimate; uncertainty diagnostics are reported in the CSV metadata only.

description: Output-error state-space residual model using the same open-loop rollout structure as the fitted parameter model.
notes: Lightweight 6DOF OEM analogue; validation is open loop, but the training solve is one-step residual ridge rather than a full multiple-shooting NLP.

description: Affine derivative regression rolled out open-loop with explicit integration.
notes: 6DOF analogue of equation-error least squares; sensitive to derivative noise in mocap-derived states.

description: Smoothed weak-form derivative fit used as a lightweight variational baseline.
notes: Approximates the variational idea by smoothing trajectories before derivative regression.

description: Sparse quadratic-library derivative model for the full 6DOF state.
notes: Uses a generic polynomial library rather than aerodynamic-coefficient structure.

description: Sparse stepwise quadratic one-step predictor.
notes: Symbolic-regression-style sparse predictor used as a 6DOF counterpart to the 3DOF symbolic row.

description: Quadratic lifted one-step predictor rolled out in the original state coordinates.
notes: EDMD-style lifted surrogate; no aerodynamic coefficient interpretation.

description: Attached-flow nominal dynamics plus quadratic learned residual map.

description: Physics-structured residual closure constrained to the attached-flow 6DOF equations.
